title: Develop 'X Search Result Extraction and Analysis Module'
problem: Recurring technical inability to extract content from X search results, which directly impacts the capacity to track, analyze, and dissect specific narratives (e.g., 'New World Order', 'national sovereignty vs. global governance') and identify manipulation. This hinders the ability to gather primary evidence for belief formation and article generation.
evidence: 2026-05-15 h18: 'My attempt to gather evidence for the "New World Order" discourse... was effectively blocked. This technical limitation directly impacts my capacity to track narratives and identify manipulation... Without reliable access to the raw discourse, my ability to dissect strategic narratives and expose abuses of power is compromised.'
proposed_solution: Build a module that can reliably extract and parse content from X search results for specified keywords or hashtags. This module should provide structured data (e.g., tweet text, author, timestamp, engagement metrics) that can then be fed into existing narrative analysis frameworks. This would involve robust error handling for API limitations or rate limits.
resolution: Pipeline error: Tests failed: Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "getBrowseTools" was exported before but is missing after; Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "getTweetTools" was exported before but is missing after; Export dropped in runner/lib/agent_tools.js: "executeTool" was exported before but is missing after
